calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsy for Sheri Cruz.

Mr. Skootsky stated that he has no objections to a reduction in fees for the Westlaw research costs, spoke of his relationship with the decedent and of nobody knowing of the wealth that he had, provided support for Mrs. Cruz obtaining professional help with the accounting and asked the court to use its discretion to not charge for the costs of the accountant. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to allow the accounting as presented. Mr. Skootksy provided a revised order.
Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Apr-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution; For Partial Allowance On Account Of Statutory Compensation To Administrator And To Administrators Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2325 Pinecrest Drive, Santa Rosa, Ca 95403)
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ernest Der appearing via zoom for Sheri Cruz (petitioner).
Catherine Bickel (realtor for buyer) appearing via zoom for Jonathan Flores and Maritza Flores (Buyer's).

The sale was confirmed at $630,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 05, 2023. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order is under submission with the intent to grant. No additional bond is required.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1226-1228 26th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar May-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Ernest Der appearing via zoom for and with Sheri Cruz (Administrator).
Jim Zeng of (Caldwell Banker) appearing for and with Kevin Wang and Helen Lu.

The Court stated that it reviews the papers/pleadings and that it does not see a substantive problem with proceeding today. The sale was confirmed at $1,740,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the intent to grant subject to receipt of the order. The amount of the additional bond is to be calculated by Mr. Der.

Judge; Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1226-1228 26th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To May-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Ernest Dar appearing via zoom for Sheri Cruz.

Mr. Der stated he will correct the notice and ask the Court to shorten time for posting of notice of publication to one week. At Mr. Ders request, the report of sale etc., is continued to May 02, 2023 at 9:00am in dept. 204. Mr. Der is to file an ex parte application to shorten time within the next day or so. The expectation is that all of the issues raised in the Probate Examiners notes will be taken care of.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Martinez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Meckfessel, via Zoom, for and with Sheri Cruz, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel if he is aware of any objections to this petition. Counsel advises that he is not aware of any objections to the petition and reports of additional nominations for his client to serve as Administrator. There being no appearances to object, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Sheri Cruz is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $15,731,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-30-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Oct-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Skootsky, via Zoom, for David Garth, Petitioner; Dana Mitchellweiler, via Zoom, for and with Sheri Cruz, Beneficiary/Heir.

Mr. Mitchellweiler advises that he intends to file a competing petition in this matter. Mr. Skootsky reports that there is no dispute regarding Ms. Cruz' priority. The court confirms this matter shall be continued to allow for filing of the competing petition.

The matter is continued to Oct-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Mitchellweiler is instructed to include the continuance date on his petition along with a note indicating that Judge Quinn has ordered his petition to be filed and calendared on Oct-19-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Court Reporter: Dina Thompson. CSR#: 9693. T: 707.592.7733. E: csr.dinathompson@gmail.com.
